# Pinned Python environment for the NIDS feature-extractor study.
# Target: Python 3.11 (NFStream wheel compatibility). Install into the
# dedicated conda env `nids-xstudy` (see env/environment.yml).
#
#   conda activate nids-xstudy
#   pip install -r env/requirements.txt
#
# NOTE: NFStream bundles nDPI; on Windows it installs from a prebuilt wheel.

# --- Feature extraction (native, pure-python tool) ---
nfstream==6.5.4

# --- PCAP synthesis for the smoke-test fixture ---
scapy==2.5.0

# --- Data handling ---
pandas==2.2.3
pyarrow==17.0.0
numpy==1.26.4
pyyaml==6.0.2
# IANA timezone DB (Windows lacks it) — required for ADT->UTC label conversion.
tzdata==2024.1

# --- ML pipeline (Phase 3+) ---
scikit-learn==1.5.2
xgboost==2.1.1

# --- Stats / analysis (Phase 5) ---
scipy==1.14.1
statsmodels==0.14.4

# --- Testing / tooling ---
pytest==8.3.3
tqdm==4.66.5
